zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Pierrepont Esquire於大約1415年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾霍爾梅 皮朋特時，他的父親Sir Henry Pierrepont27歲，母親Ellen Langford25歲。他和Thomasine Melton至少有3個兒子。他去世於1457年7月21日在他的家鄉享年43歲。

nameMeanings.name: Pierrepont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Pierrepont Esquire was born about 1415, in Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Sir Henry Pierrepont, was 27 and his mother, Ellen Langford, was 25. He had at least 3 sons with Thomasine Melton. He died on 21 July 1457, in his hometown, at the age of 43.

Il a eu au moins 3 fils avec Thomasine Melton. Il est décédé le 21 juillet 1457, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans.

ko.Holme Pierrepont with Adbolton, Nottingh: 영국 노틴그함실르 홀 피레폰트 위스 아드볼턴
ko.lifeSummary: Henry Pierrepont Esquire(이)가 대략 1415년 영국 노틴그함실르 홀 피레폰트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Henry Pierrepont(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen Langford(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Thomasine Melton(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1457년 7월 21일 그의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.
